mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in retail sales signals improving household demand and near-term revenue momentum for large-cap firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value available for 2025-07-01 in the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher subsequent 20-day S&P 500 returns than lower RSAFS growth in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in unemployment signals weakening labor income and recession risk, causing equity investors to mark down earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value available for 2025-07-01 in the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases and mean triggered returns are not below unconditional mean returns at p <= 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: When the policy rate is already restrictive and CPI inflation re-accelerates, markets price a longer high-rate path, raising discount rates and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS > 4.0% and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth crosses above its prior 3-month annualized growth
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL vintage values available for 2025-07-01 in the decision snapshot
regime_hint: restrictive monetary policy with inflation persistence
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger is followed by non-negative average 20-day S&P 500 returns or if the interaction term between FEDFUNDS level and CPIAUCSL acceleration has the wrong sign in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production signals improving real output and operating leverage for cyclical firms, supporting earnings revisions and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value available for 2025-07-01 in the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month INDPRO growth is not associated with higher subsequent 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if the signal has negative Rank IC in two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening interest-rate-sensitive demand and future construction-related earnings pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value available for 2025-06-01 in the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST declines below the trigger are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 65% of cases or if average triggered returns exceed unconditional average returns.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth combined with a flat or falling policy rate signals a soft-landing expansion: earnings cash flows improve without additional discount-rate pressure, producing positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and FEDFUNDS 3-month change is less than or equal to 0
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS and FEDFUNDS vintage values available for 2025-07-01 in the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-positive and FEDFUNDS-flat-or-falling trigger does not outperform unconditional 20-day S&P 500 returns, or if the interaction coefficient is non-positive in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI growth exceeds retail sales growth, inflation is eroding real consumption rather than reflecting stronger demand, pressuring margins and real revenues and producing negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month percentage growth crosses above RSAFS 3-month percentage growth
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL and RSAFS vintage values available for 2025-07-01 in the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-over-RSAFS growth trigger is followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the interaction signal has Rank IC below 0.02 over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth above trend signals broad demand resilience and stronger aggregate profits, leading investors to raise earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 annualized quarter-over-quarter growth crosses above 2%
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 vintage value available for 2025-04-01 in the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 growth above the trigger fails to produce higher average 60-day S&P 500 returns than below-trigger observations, or if the effect is insignificant at p > 0.05 in walk-forward tests.
